<!--
Thanks for your contribution! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first.
This is a curated data collection: data files are regenerated, not hand-edited.
Open an issue before investing time in a non-trivial PR.
-->

## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 — required for data/doc changes -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation fix (README / codebook / changelog)
- [ ] Metadata / attribution / license fix
- [ ] New dataset (regenerated from a documented, reproducible method)
- [ ] CI / repository configuration

## Checklist

- [ ] I have signed the CLA (the CLA Assistant bot will prompt external contributors)
- [ ] I did **not** hand-edit data files under `datasets/*/data/` (data is regenerated, not patched)
- [ ] Attribution to both the original source **and** Santander AI Lab is preserved
- [ ] No secrets, internal URLs, or personal/proprietary data are included
- [ ] For a new dataset: it includes its own `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `CITATION.cff`, and `LICENSE`
